faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Graniteville typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Graniteville homes?
faqs.answer: Graniteville properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures, while pavement ants typically enter through foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate an ant infestation in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Most ant infestations in Graniteville can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment, with complete colony elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks. Treatment time varies based on colony size and location, but our methods target both visible ants and the colony source for lasting results.

faqs.question: Do you offer preventative ant control services in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer seasonal preventative ant control programs for Graniteville residents to keep ants from returning. Our preventative services include exterior barrier treatments, entry point sealing, and regular inspections to catch potential problems early. Many customers choose quarterly maintenance to ensure year-round protection.
